message:
chore(artifacts): refresh verification evidence timestamps from automated re-run

Update verification evidence across sections 10.4, 10.5, 10.6, 10.9,
10.12, 10.13, 10.14, 10.15, 13, and migration cohort 15. Timestamps
reflect latest concurrent agent verification pass. Some beads show FAIL
due to cargo binary not found in sandboxed verification environment.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
